keys.subject: Your 14-day free trial has started — ${service}
keys.headline: Trial ends tomorrow
keys.introHtml: Your free trial expires tomorrow. Upgrade today to avoid losing access to your workspace and data.
keys.closingHtml: After the trial ends your server will remain powered on for 7 more days, but ERP access will be blocked until you upgrade.
keys._sourceNote: Extracted from trial-day-1.ts — full HTML/text managed in web-i18n locales; template code uses locale resolver.
